name: MAC-10 | 战争手柄
descriptionEn: Essentially a box that bullets come out of, the MAC-10 SMG boasts a high rate of fire, with poor spread accuracy and high recoil as trade-offs. It has been custom painted to resemble a game pad and various buttons poking through a clear polymer casing. Giving the phrase \"console wars\" a whole new meaning
descriptionZh: 本质上就是个能射出子弹的盒子，MAC-10 微型冲锋枪拥有高频率的射速，作为交换，它还拥有略逊一筹的精准度和高后坐力。 这把武器采用自定义涂装，像极了游戏手柄，各式按键延伸入透明聚合物材质的外壳内。 重新诠释“主机战争”
